name: Tori Shogi
author: Abstract Games factory
description: Tori Shogi (Bird Shogi, 1828): a 7x7 Shogi variant where every piece is a bird. Captured birds switch sides and drop back into play; Swallows and Falcons promote in the far two ranks. Features the asymmetric Left and Right Quails and a Pheasant that jumps two squares forward.
